SEARCH
Package pl.polsl.entity

Class AnalysisOperation

java.lang.Object
pl.polsl.entity.AnalysisOperation
@Entity public class AnalysisOperation extends Object
JPA Entity representing a single analysis operation. Stores information about performed stock analysis.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Blazej Jamrozik

  • Constructor Details

    • AnalysisOperation

      public AnalysisOperation()
      Default constructor required by JPA.

    • AnalysisOperation

      public AnalysisOperation(String analysisType, String filePath, LocalDateTime timestamp, String resultText, Integer recordsCount)
      Constructor with parameters.
      Parameters:
      analysisType - type of analysis
      filePath - file path used
      timestamp - timestamp of operation
      resultText - result as text
      recordsCount - number of records
